headline: Get Nailed Beauty Salon wins Best Nail Art & Nail Care Provider
standfirst: Get Nailed Beauty Salon is recognised in the Global Business Excellence Awards previous winners archive for Best Nail Art & Nail Care Provider, with source-backed context prepared for readers reviewing the award record.

content.text: Get Nailed Beauty Salon and the award record

Get Nailed Beauty Salon is recorded by the Global Business Excellence Awards as the winner of Best Nail Art & Nail Care Provider. This article gives the award record context for readers who are searching for Get Nailed Beauty Salon, the exact award title, and the verified sources currently available for this winner profile.

Official social profiles describe nail, waxing, and facial services. The GBE archive records Best Nail Art & Nail Care Provider. The profile is intentionally written as an award record rather than an unsupported marketing biography, so claims about scale, leadership, service quality, or market position are limited to what the cited sources can support.
Why the Best Nail Art & Nail Care Provider record matters

The Best Nail Art & Nail Care Provider recognition places Get Nailed Beauty Salon in the GBE previous winners archive for 2025. For a prospective customer, partner, journalist, or award researcher, the practical value of this page is a clean public record: who received the award, what the award was called, and which source trail was reviewed before publication.
Award title: Best Nail Art & Nail Care Provider.
Recipient profile reviewed against available source notes.

Source notes reviewed for this page include gbeaward.com, instagram.com, facebook.com. These references are used to confirm identity, business activity, programme identity, or award context. Where a source is a social profile, directory listing, booking platform, or press article rather than a recipient-owned website, the article keeps the claim narrow and avoids treating that source as proof of wider performance.
For the Best Nail Art & Nail Care Provider page, that source trail anchors the story to the exact award record instead of a broad promotional profile.

No standalone official website was found; source confidence is social-profile based. This limitation matters because the site should not turn a winner listing into inflated SEO copy. It should help people discover the award record while keeping every visible claim defensible.
The Best Nail Art & Nail Care Provider page therefore stays careful, useful, and defensible for readers checking the public record.

Get Nailed Beauty Salon's winner page will continue to be updated when stronger official sources, rights-cleared media, recipient statements, or ceremony materials are available. Until then, this page prioritises clarity, the official award wording, and source-backed context over generic promotional language.
Future updates to the Best Nail Art & Nail Care Provider page can add deeper recipient context when stronger evidence is available.
